text: The discussion method in this study is how the teacher presents the material by allowing students or groups to discuss it in order to obtain suggestions, conclusions and alternative solutions. Learning outcomes are the value of student learning outcomes in Islamic religious education subjects. Therefore, in the Islamic religious education field, the aim is to guide students to acquire more insight and understanding of the procedures for changing a Muslim in relation to God, humans and nature in order to achieve the goals of learning. This research is a correlational research between two variables, namely the discussion method (X) and learning outcomes (Y). The population in this study is all MAN 1 Tangerang students, amounting to 742 students. The sample in this study were students of class XI MAN 1 Tangerang amounting to 117 students. The sample taken using the Non Probability Quota technique is in class XI as many as 38 students. The authors use the product moment correlation analysis. The results of the calculation of the product moment correlation formula obtained calculated r = 0.34. The results of the comparison of calculated r with the table r = 0.32 at a level of significance of 5% stated that the calculated r is larger than the table r. Therefore, the null hypothesis is rejected. It means that there is no influence between the discussion method and student learning outcomes in the Islamic religious education at MAN 1 Tangerang students in material commendable morals and despicable morals.
